raw_consumer_statement:
ON XX/XX/year> i had fraud on my citi account. I was charged XXXX in fraud on my citi card. i called and reported it as fraud and it was removed. approximately 2 months XXXX the charges were put back on the card. 
I have called 35+ times, spent 60+ hours on the phone with many people to dispute the charges. This has gone on for 7 months and I talk to supervisors and said yes, that is an issue and will get back to yo

u in 24-48 hours. Nobody has every called me back. today i called in today to refile a dispute and refused. They refused to push me to and supervisor. They refused to do anything and i am at my wit 's end If there is any proof that i have signed off, ordered, anything, I will gladly pay it. I need help please please help me
